title: UTILITY KNIFE WITH 18MM WIDE BLADE ( BLADE: 100*18MM )
subtitle: UTILITY KNIFE WITH 18MM
overview: Our M&G utility knife with an 18mm wide blade is designed for heavy-duty cutting tasks, featuring a manual blade lock for safe and secure use. Its SK5 high carbon blades are ultra-sharp and durable, providing long-lasting cutting performance. Despite its high-quality build and features, it is offered at an economical price, making it accessible to a wide range of our customers.  Perfect for use in the workshop, home improvement projects, and other demanding cutting applications.
